designNotes.skillBaseline: Fire projectile, 0.7 SPR, 5s CD, chainCount 2 base. Consumes soul_stacks: +1 bounce per stack consumed (max 5 stacks → up to 7 bounces).

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Each bounce ignites and burns. The skull is a torch that lights up a pack.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Bounces spawn ghosts. Skull cast becomes a minion-summoning event.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Soul stack consume goes nuclear — each bounce hits harder than the last.

branches.theme: Each bounce ignites. The skull is the torch that sets a pack ablaze.

nodes.name: Ignite Chance
nodes.description: Each Bouncing Skull bounce has 25/50% chance to apply Burning (3s).
engineFields: igniteChanceOnBounce (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast for staff_bouncing_skull: per bounce roll chance, apply burning)

nodes.name: Compound Heat
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull hits have 15/30% chance to apply 1 stack of Bleeding (3s).
engineFields: procs[onHit] (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pyre Trail
nodes.description: Each Bouncing Skull bounce leaves a 2s fire patch dealing 30% of bounce damage per second.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullPyreTrail (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per bounce, spawn area-DoT effect with calculated tick damage)

nodes.name: Plague Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% damage per debuff on target.
engineFields: conditionalMods.perAilmentStackOnTarget (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Burning Synergy
nodes.description: +15/30% Bouncing Skull damage on Burning targets.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Crit Burn
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull critical strikes apply Burning (3s/5s).
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS); applyDebuff.burning (EXISTS in DEBUFF_META)

nodes.name: Fire Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% fire penetration.
engineFields: firePenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pyre Bloom
nodes.description: When Bouncing Skull's last bounce lands: emit a fire AoE dealing 200% of last bounce damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullFinalAoeBonus (NEW — staff.ts postCast: track last-bounce, after final bounce emit AoE damage event = lastBounceDamage * value/100)

nodes.name: Fire Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to Fire-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pyromancer
nodes.description: Burning DoT damage from your skills is doubled. Cost: −20% Bouncing Skull direct damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.globalBurningMultiplier (NEW — tick.ts auto-ailment block for burning: tick damage *= value); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Inferno Trail
nodes.description: Pyre Trail (T2) duration +200% and tick damage +50%. Cost: Bouncing Skull CD +2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.pyreTrailBonusDurationPercent + pyreTrailBonusDamagePercent (NEW); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Stack Compounder
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull damage +5% per stack of Burning/Bleeding/Poisoned on target (caps at +50%).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullStackCompounder (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: count debuff stacks of types, multiply damageMult)

nodes.name: THE BURNING WORLD
nodes.description: All Bouncing Skull bounces leave a 5s fire pool dealing 100% of bounce damage per second. Cost: Bouncing Skull direct hit damage −50%.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.burningWorldFirePool (NEW — supersedes Pyre Trail); incDamage (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Each bounce manifests a spirit. Skulls become a minion-spawning event.

nodes.name: Extra Bounce
nodes.description: +1/2 base bounces (chainCount).
engineFields: chainCount (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Spirit Bounce
nodes.description: Each Bouncing Skull bounce has 15/30% chance to spawn a 2s spirit minion at impact.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullBounceSpiritChance (NEW — staff.ts postCast: per bounce roll chance, summonMinions spirit_temp duration=2)

nodes.name: Pack Skull
nodes.description: +1 bounce per living minion (in addition to base + soul stack consume bounces).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullPerMinionBounce (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: chainCount += value * activeMinionCount)

nodes.name: Bound Power
nodes.description: +10/20% Bouncing Skull damage while any minion alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +20/40% crit chance while 2+ minions alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Bone Echo
nodes.description: On Bouncing Skull cast: 25/50% chance to summon a 4s spirit minion immediately.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); summonMinion (NEW)

nodes.name: Bounce Linger
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull bounces +15/30% slower (lingers longer on each enemy, allows minions to attack).
engineFields: bonusBounceDuration (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast: per bounce, increase visual delay/dwell time, no damage effect)

nodes.name: Spirit Conduit
nodes.description: Each bounce of Bouncing Skull also triggers a free attack from each living minion on the bounce target.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullBounceTriggersMinionAttacks (NEW — staff.ts postCast per bounce: emit synthetic attack event from each living minion)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.
engineFields: minionDamageMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Skull Storm
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull cast spawns 3 skulls (each with own bounce count). Cost: Bouncing Skull damage per skull −50%.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullMultiSkull (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: hitCount *= 1 + extraSkulls; track skulls separately for chain logic); incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Endless Skulls
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull bounces forever (no chain limit) but loses 15% damage per bounce after the 3rd.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullEndlessBounces (NEW — staff.ts postCast: bounce until target dead OR damage falls below threshold)

nodes.name: Skull Aura
nodes.description: While 4+ minions alive, Bouncing Skull always crits.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullCritWhileMinionsThreshold (NEW — tick.ts crit roll for staff_bouncing_skull: if minionCount >= threshold, force crit)

nodes.name: THE BONE CANNON
nodes.description: Each Bouncing Skull cast spawns a permanent (8s) Skull Tower minion at impact location that fires bone projectiles. Cost: Bouncing Skull bounces −2.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.boneTowerSummon (NEW — staff.ts postCast: summon turret-style minion at impact, requires new SUMMON_CONFIG 'bone_tower'); chainCount (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Soul stack consume goes nuclear. Each bounce hits harder than the last.

nodes.name: Compounding Bounce
nodes.description: Each Bouncing Skull bounce after the first deals +10/20% damage (compounds: bounce 2 = +10/20%, bounce 3 = +20/40%, etc.).
engineFields: bouncingSkullDamageCompound (NEW — numeric; staff.ts postCast per bounce: damage *= 1 + (bounceIndex - 1) * value/100)

nodes.name: Soul Bounce
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull critical strikes have 25/50% chance to generate 1 soul_stack. ICD 2s.
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS); createComboState (NEW)

nodes.name: Soul Cannon
nodes.description: Each soul_stack consumed by Bouncing Skull adds +25% damage (in addition to +1 bounce per stack).
engineFields: soulConsumeChainBonus (NEW — numeric; staff.ts preRoll for staff_bouncing_skull when consuming soul_stack: damageMult *= 1 + stacks * value/100)

nodes.name: Hex Synergy
nodes.description: +15/30% Bouncing Skull damage on Hexed targets.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Stack Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% Bouncing Skull damage per active soul_stack.
engineFields: damagePerSoulStackActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hex Strike
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull crits have 25/50% chance to apply Hexed (5s).
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Quickdraw
nodes.description: −15/30% Bouncing Skull cooldown.
engineFields: cooldownReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Death Cascade
nodes.description: When Bouncing Skull kills an enemy: bounce count refunds (skull continues with reset bounce counter).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullKillRefundsBounces (NEW — staff.ts postCast bounce loop: if bounce-target killed, reset bounce counter for remaining bounces)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Final Whisper
nodes.description: Last bounce of Bouncing Skull deals +200% damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullFinalBounceBonus (NEW — staff.ts postCast: identify last bounce, damage *= 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: Mass Soul Burst
nodes.description: Each soul_stack consumed by Bouncing Skull adds 2 bounces (instead of 1) and +50% damage. Cost: Bouncing Skull CD +2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulConsumeBounceMultiplier + soulConsumeDamagePerStackMultiplier (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: chainCount += stacks * multiplier; damage *= 1 + stacks * dmgPercent/100); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soul Resonance
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull crits also generate 1 soul_stack instantly (independent of other procs).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullCritGuaranteesSoulStack (NEW — tick.ts crit hook for staff_bouncing_skull: createComboState soul_stack +1)

nodes.name: THE FINAL CALL
nodes.description: Bouncing Skull consumes ALL active combo states on cast (haunted, plagued, hexed, soul_stacks, spirit_link). Each consumed adds +50% damage. Cost: Bouncing Skull CD +5s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.bouncingSkullConsumesAllStates (NEW — staff.ts preRoll: enumerate active comboStates, for each: damageMult *= 1 + perStatePercent/100, consume); cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)
